aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Bohannon Service Company due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema for existing FAQ content

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with positive reviews and essential information but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer
Ensure NAP details match across all online directories

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service-related content

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable local service provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries in Arlington, Texas
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and customer testimonials to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top local HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Bohannon Service Company is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup, and GBP engagement is minimal, limiting AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize Your HVAC Business for the Future
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
